steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal: contrast the two samples
steps.content: The student wants to CONTRAST the two samples — to highlight what differs between them, not what they have in common or general facts about torsional heating.

steps.title: Match the data to that goal
steps.content:
The matching choice directly contrasts the samples by identifying a concrete difference: the natural rubber sample (2.2 millimeters) is thicker than the NiTi wire (0.7 millimeters).

The other choices fail to contrast:
  • B emphasizes what's similar (both heated)
  • C explains torsional heating in general
  • D merely names the samples without comparing them

A is correct.
